A Career Anthology • 2012–Present

GREATEST HITS — DANIELE D'AGNELLI

label: professional services | format: 15-year career | remastered 2025
SIDE A
1. swiss manufacturer (c3 ai)
100+ plants, 2,000+ users, $18m ebit impact — "the one that went platinum"
2. british telco (deloitte)
first enterprise-wide deployment across 7 business units — "the debut that built the practice"
3. american bank (deloitte)
data architecture transformation, 75k employees — "the deep cut fans love"
SIDE B
4. uk investment firm (deloitte)
financial planning, £170.3b aum — "the quiet masterpiece"
5. aerospace co (accenture)
demand forecasting, design lead — "the early single"
produced by 15 years of relentless craft. engineered with python, ml, and genai. mixed in london. mastered with a gchq-certified msc.
